title: No more "zoo": the Ukrainian Armed Forces will receive a universal...
title_en: No more "zoo": the Ukrainian Armed Forces will receive a universal...
description: No more "zoo": the Ukrainian Armed Forces will receive a universal ground station for fiber-optic drones. As Defense Minister Mikhail Fyodorov said today, fiber-optic drones are one of the key elements of defeating the enemy. "However, for every operator working with fiber-optic drones, there is a problem - a "zoo" of ground control stations for launching UAVs," he noted. According to the minister, on...
description_en: No more "zoo": the Ukrainian Armed Forces will receive a universal ground station for fiber-optic drones. "However, for every operator working with fiber-optic drones, there is a problem - a "zoo" of ground control stations for launching UAVs," he noted. According to the minister, on...
description_uk: Больше никакого "зоопарка": ВСУ получат универсальную наземную станцию для оптоволоконных дронов Как сообщил министр обороны Михаил Фёдоров сегодня дроны на оптоволокне – один из ключевых элементов поражения врага. "Однако для каждого оператора, работающего с оптоволоконными дронами, есть проблема – «зоопарк» наземных станций управления для запуска БпЛА", - отметил он. По словам министра, на...

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Ukraine pushing to produce home-grown ballistic defense system 'within a year,' Zelensky says. Kyiv's intention to pursue such a system is not new, but the announcement marks the first time officials have attached such an ambitious timeline to the effort.

description: Conducted a special selector with all regions and with the participation of the Prime Minister of Ukraine and government officials on preparation for the next heating season - primarily from a security point of view. Quite specific sustainability plans have been approved for all our regions, cities and communities. These are clear documents that determine which objects are in priority need of restoration, where additional protection should be provided, and what tasks...
description_en: Conducted a special selector with all regions and with the participation of the Prime Minister of Ukraine and government officials on preparation for the next heating season - primarily from a security point of view. Quite specific sustainability plans have been approved for all our regions, cities and communities. These are clear documents that determine which objects are in priority need of restoration, where additional protection should be provided, and what tasks...
description_uk: Провів спеціальний селектор з усіма регіонами та за участі Премʼєр-міністра України й урядовців про підготовку до наступного опалювального сезону – передусім з безпекової точки зору. Для всіх наших областей, міст та громад затверджені цілком конкретні плани стійкості. Це чіткі документи, які визначають, які обʼєкти першочергово потребують відновлення, де має бути додатковий захист і які завдання...

title: Beautiful: Ukraine suppresses the "invincible" Russian "Daggers" with...
title_en: Beautiful: Ukraine suppresses the "invincible" Russian "Daggers" with...
description: Beautiful: Ukraine suppresses the "invincible" Russian "Daggers" with the help of EW On the video - the fall of the rocket after losing its course. According to reports, "Kynzhal" was knocked off its trajectory by the Ukrainian EW system of strategic level "Lima". According to sources, since the beginning of the complex's use, 58 "Daggers" have been neutralized, of which 26 have been neutralized since the beginning of this year. Also, the system works on second missiles, UAVs and KABs.
description_en: Beautiful: Ukraine suppresses the "invincible" Russian "Daggers" with the help of EW On the video - the fall of the rocket after losing its course. According to reports, "Kynzhal" was knocked off its trajectory by the Ukrainian EW system of strategic level "Lima". According to sources, since the beginning of the complex's use, 58 "Daggers" have been neutralized, of which 26 have been neutralized since the beginning of this year. Also, the system works on second missiles, UAVs and KABs.
description_uk: Красивое: Украина подавляет «непобедимые» российские «Кинжалы» средствами РЭБ На видео — падение ракеты после потери курса. Как сообщается, «Кинжал» сбила с траектории украинская система РЭБ стратегического уровня «Лима». По данным источников, с начала применения комплекса уже нейтрализовали 58 «Кинжалов», из них 26 — с начала этого года. Также система работает по другим ракетам, БпЛА и КАБам.

description: Europol hackathon identifies 45 more Ukrainian children forcibly deported to Russia. The two-day operation, held on April 16–17, brought together 40 experts from 18 countries, alongside the International Criminal Court and several non-governmental partners.
description_en: Europol hackathon identifies 45 more Ukrainian children forcibly deported to Russia. The two-day operation, held on April 16–17, brought together 40 experts from 18 countries, alongside the International Criminal Court and several non-governmental partners.

title: Crimea: Attack attack
title_en: Crimea: Attack attack
description: Update: Ukraine strikes oil refinery in Russia's Krasnodar Krai for 2nd time in a week, sparking major fire, General Staff confirms. In addition to the oil refinery, Ukraine struck the Hvardiiske oil depot in Russian-occupied Crimea, as well as two landing ships of Project 1171 and Project 775, the General Staff said.
description_en: Update: Ukraine strikes oil refinery in Russia's Krasnodar Krai for 2nd time in a week, sparking major fire, General Staff confirms. In addition to the oil refinery, Ukraine struck the Hvardiiske oil depot in Russian-occupied Crimea, as well as two landing ships of Project 1171 and Project 775, the General Staff said.
description_uk: Update: Ukraine strikes oil refinery in Russia's Krasnodar Krai for 2nd time in a week, sparking major fire, General Staff confirms. In addition to the oil refinery, Ukraine struck the Hvardiiske oil depot in Russian-occupied Crimea, as well as two landing ships of Project 1171 and Project 775, the General Staff said.

title: Goyda! The defense forces worked on targets in the Russian Federation...
title_en: Goyda! The defense forces worked on targets in the Russian Federation...
title_uk: Гойда! Сили оборони відпрацювали об'єкти в РФ...
description: Goyda! The defense forces worked on targets in the Russian Federation and occupied Crimea. The General Staff of the Armed Forces confirmed the defeat of the oil refinery in Tuapse - it is reported that the tank farm was hit. The "Gvardeyskaya" oil base in Crimea was also affected. And in Sevastopol, two large amphibious ships of projects 1171 and 775 were hit. The degree of damage is specified.
description_en: Goyda! The defense forces worked on targets in the Russian Federation and occupied Crimea. The General Staff of the Armed Forces confirmed the defeat of the oil refinery in Tuapse - it is reported that the tank farm was hit. The "Gvardeyskaya" oil base in Crimea was also affected. And in Sevastopol, two large amphibious ships of projects 1171 and 775 were hit. The degree of damage is specified.
description_uk: Гойда! Сили обороны отработали по целям в рф и оккупированном Крыму В Генштабе ВСУ подтвердили поражение НПЗ в Туапсе — сообщается о попадании в резервуарный парк. Также поражена нефтебаза «Гвардейская» в Крыму. А в Севастополе под удар попали два больших десантных корабля проектов 1171 и 775. Степень повреждений уточняется.

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
description: Shahed, who attacked the house of Flash, was controlled from the territory of the Russian Federation. Beskrestnov himself stated this on the air of the telethon. For the attempt, the Russians used four jet drones, some of which were shot down: "This was a special operation aimed at finding and liquidating me. We have confirmation that this drone was operated from the territory of Russia." According to "Flash", now about 20% of all "Shakhedov" already...

description_uk: «Шахед», атаковавший дом «Флэша, управлялся с территории рф Об этом сам Бескрестнов заявил в эфире телемарафона. Для покушения россияне использовали четыре реактивных дронов, часть из них удалось сбить: «Это была спецоперация с целью найти меня и ликвидировать. У нас есть подтверждение, что этот беспилотник управлялся с территории россии». По словам «Флэша», сейчас около 20% всех «Шахедов» уже...

title: Evacuation ordered
title_en: Evacuation ordered
description: The Medical Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine are implementing the MedEvac digital system, which is designed to increase the efficiency of providing assistance to the wounded at all stages of medical evacuation. In particular, the paper "Form 100" - the primary medical card of a wounded serviceman, which records the circumstances of the injury, the time of application of the tourniquet and the assistance provided - was replaced with an electronic primary medical card...
description_en: The Medical Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine are implementing the MedEvac digital system, which is designed to increase the efficiency of providing assistance to the wounded at all stages of medical evacuation. In particular, the paper "Form 100" - the primary medical card of a wounded serviceman, which records the circumstances of the injury, the time of application of the tourniquet and the assistance provided - was replaced with an electronic primary medical card...
description_uk: У Медичних силах Збройних Силах України впроваджують цифрову систему MedEvac, яка покликана підвищити ефективність надання допомоги пораненим на всіх етапах медичної евакуації. Зокрема, відбулась заміна паперової "Форми 100" – первинної медичної картки пораненого військовослужбовця, що фіксує обставини травми, час накладання турнікета та надану допомогу - на електронну первинну медичну картку...

title_en: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Top Defense Ministry advisor injured in allegedly targeted Russian drone strike. Military communications expert and Defense Ministry advisor Serhii Beskrestnov was injured in what he said was a targeted Russian drone strike on his home outside Kyiv overnight on April 20.

title: Attack attack
title_en: Attack attack
description: 😱 In the USA, a man shot eight children between the ages of 1 and 14, - NBC The shooting took place in the city of Shreveport (Louisiana) in several houses at once. In total, 10 people were injured, eight children died, two survived. According to the police, some of the victims were relatives of the shooter. After the attack, he stole a car and tried to hide, but was shot during the chase. Motives of the crime until...
description_en: 😱 In the USA, a man shot eight children between the ages of 1 and 14, - NBC The shooting took place in the city of Shreveport (Louisiana) in several houses at once. In total, 10 people were injured, eight children died, two survived. According to the police, some of the victims were relatives of the shooter. After the attack, he stole a car and tried to hide, but was shot during the chase. Motives of the crime until...
description_uk: 😱 В США мужчина расстрелял восьмерых детей в возрасте от 1 до 14 лет, - NBC Стрельба произошла в городе Шривпорт (Луизиана) сразу в нескольких домах. Всего пострадали 10 человек, восемь детей погибли, двое выжили. Как сообщает полиция, часть жертв была родственниками стрелка. После нападения он угнал автомобиль и попытался скрыться, но был застрелен во время погони. Мотивы преступления пока...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported

description: Police chief resigns in wake of Kyiv mass shooting. Yevhen Zhukov, head of Ukraine's patrol police, resigned on April 19 amid controversy over the police response to the deadly mass shooting in Kyiv the previous day.
